sources_used: SoulSplitter wiki: Sekiro item pickup flags extracted via Yapped; right-most column is event flag.
PowerPyx Prayer Bead guide: exact human-readable Prayer Bead location/source enemy names.
SoulsMods Paramdex: ItemLotParam and ShopLineupParam field definitions.
sekiro-online/params: EquipParamGoods row data for boss Memory goods names.
sekiro-online/params: ItemLotParam row data for boss Memory award entries.
SoulSplitter source: Sekiro Boss enum and splitter logic for candidate speedrun boss split flags.
sekiro-online/params: EquipParamWeapon row data for base Prosthetic Tool weapon IDs.
sekiro-online/params: EquipParamWeapon row data for Prosthetic Tool upgrade weapon IDs.
sekiro-online/params: EquipParamGoods row data for Prosthetic Tool source item names.
sekiro-online/params: SkillParam row data for combat-art skill links.
sekiro-online/params: EquipParamWeapon row data for combat-art skill weapon IDs and names.
sekiro-online/params: SkillParam and EquipParamWeapon row data for verified passive, latent, martial-art, and special skill ownership rows.
sekiro-online/params: EquipParamGoods row data for Ninjutsu candidate goods IDs.
Fextralife Skills and Skill Trees page: community skill tree/name/cost/prerequisite context.
Fextralife skill and Esoteric Text pages: community acquisition metadata for mapped Combat Arts.
Fextralife Endings page: community ending-route requirements and final choice items.
sekiro-online/params: EquipParamGoods row data for key item, Esoteric Text, and Prosthetic Tool source item names and IDs.
sekiro-online/params: ItemLotParam row data for secondary Prayer Bead reward/replacement entries.
sekiro-online/params: ShopLineupParam row data for merchant entries.
S0000.sl2, read-only local inspection.

event_flag_reader.status: Verified against USER_DATA000 in S0000.sl2 for low item flags 6723-6729, the 40 primary Prayer Bead pickup/shop flags, the 24 secondary Prayer Bead ItemLotParam flags, the 14 boss Memory award flags, merchant ShopLineupParam flags 71101210/71102000/71111000, and readable candidate SoulSplitter boss split flags 9301-9317. Candidate boss split flags are not reliable persistent boss status semantics.

layout.scope: Verified against USER_DATA000 in S0000.sl2 for low item flags 6723-6729, the 40 primary Prayer Bead pickup/shop flags, the 24 secondary Prayer Bead ItemLotParam flags, the 14 boss Memory award flags, merchant ShopLineupParam flags 71101210/71102000/71111000, and readable candidate SoulSplitter boss split flags 9301-9317. Candidate boss split flags are not reliable persistent boss status semantics.

evidence.details: At base 0xE8000, the six collected non-shop Gourd Seed flags are set, Sunken Valley flag 6724 is clear, Battlefield Memorial Mob shop flag 71101210 is set, Fujioka shop flag 71102000 is clear, and Abandoned Dungeon Memorial Mob Prayer Bead shop flag 71111000 is clear. Gourd Seed states exactly match the save's 7/9 Gourd Seed derived count. Prayer Bead primary event states are readable; 11 ON secondary Prayer Bead ItemLotParam flags reconcile the carried inventory-derived Prayer Bead count, and 13 OFF secondary ItemLotParam flags support the remaining missing-by-evidence locations. Boss Memory award flags from ItemLotParam rows 2001-2131 are also readable.
SoulSplitter lists the item pickup event flags extracted via Yapped.
ShopLineupParam rows 1100101 and 1100400 sell equipId 4400 with event flags 71101210 and 71102000. Row 1110000 sells equipId 4000 with event flag 71111000.
Boss Memory award rows 2001, 2011, 2017, 2021, 2031, 2041, 2051, 2061, 2071, 2081, 2091, 2101, 2121, and 2131 provide Memory goods IDs 5200-5213 and getItemFlagId values read from S0000.sl2.

limitations: SoulSplitter boss split flags 9301-9317 are readable from this save with the documented layout, but user verification shows they are not reliable persistent boss-completion evidence: Genichiro was defeated with 9303 OFF, Isshin Ashina was not defeated with 9316 OFF, and Headless Ape is uncertain with 9307 ON.

statusPolicy.defeatedRequires: verified boss defeat/progression flag with current-cycle completion semantics
statusPolicy.details: Bosses are deferred. Memory inventory, Memory award ItemLot flags, and SoulSplitter 930x boss split flags are retained as comparison/candidate evidence only. They do not produce defeated/not_defeated status without a verified persistent save/progression flag.

evidence.source: ItemLotParam row 2001 awards Memory: Gyoubu Oniwa goods ID 5200.

SoulSplitter src/SoulMemory/Sekiro/Boss.cs maps this boss to a boss split enum value, and src/SoulSplitter/Splits/Sekiro/Split.cs plus SekiroSplitter.cs read Boss split values as event flags.
evidence.details: Candidate SoulSplitter 930x boss split flag. Current conclusion: these flags are not reliable persistent boss-completion evidence, so this signal is not promoted to bossDefeatFlag and cannot drive defeated/not_defeated status.

flagStateSummary.details: Primary pickup/shop flags are readable current save event states. OFF primary flags are not promoted to definitive missing locations. Verified secondary ItemLotParam flags can independently attribute collection for locations where the primary flag is OFF; verified missing-evidence rules mark the remaining OFF reward/pickup or shop-purchase states as missing.

reconciliation.details: The save carries more Prayer Beads by inventory/progression evidence than the mapped primary pickup/shop flags show as ON. Verified secondary ItemLotParam reward/replacement flags currently attribute the 11-bead primary-flag gap for this save. The remaining 14 locations have verified reward/pickup or shop-purchase evidence flags OFF, so they are missing by evidence in this save.

unresolved.details: The 40 primary Prayer Bead locations now have source-backed mappings, 11 secondary ItemLotParam reward/replacement flags reconcile collected locations in S0000.sl2, and 14 locations are missing by verified item-lot/shop evidence. Offering Box replacement behavior is still not mapped as a general-purpose mechanic for other saves.

Rows 1700020, 1700030, and 1700040 are verified as the three Valley Prayer Bead pickup flags, but their exact row-to-location ordering among the Poison Pool statue-head pickup, Under-Shrine Valley pickup, and Gun Fort hidden pickup still needs EMEVD/coordinate verification.

unresolved.details: EquipParamWeapon verifies upgrade row IDs and names, but material/tree prerequisites have not yet been mapped from verified param or EMEVD data.

statusPolicy.unlockedRequires: verified inventory_weapon evidence for a mapped SkillParam/EquipParamWeapon skill ownership row
statusPolicy.missingRequires: verified absence of that mapped inventory_weapon ownership row in USER_DATA000
statusPolicy.unknownRequires: mapped skill identity exists but save ownership semantics are not verified, as with current Ninjutsu goods candidates
statusPolicy.details: Combat Arts and verified non-Combat-Art skills use direct weapon inventory records. Ninjutsu EquipParamGoods rows are included as unknown until their save record shape is verified. Prerequisites, Esoteric Texts, bosses, and acquisition guidance never drive ownership status.

unresolved.details: EquipParamGoods rows 2100, 2110, and 2120 identify Bloodsmoke, Puppeteer, and Bestowal Ninjutsu, but USER_DATA000 ownership semantics are not verified. Bloodsmoke has a loose goods-ID occurrence in the save, but it does not match the verified weapon-record pattern and is not used for status.
SkillParam row 670 links to weapon row 7700, but the public EquipParamWeapon row name is blank in the inspected param CSV. The skill was not promoted to verified mapping in this batch.

Human-readable costs and prerequisites remain source-backed community metadata for the prior Combat Art subset; exact in-save or param-level field semantics for learned passive/latent skills and tree unlock state remain unresolved.

statusPolicy.collectedRequires: verified key item inventory record in USER_DATA000
statusPolicy.missingRequires: verified absence of a mapped persistent key item whose absence semantics are understood
statusPolicy.unknownRequires: item ID is unmapped, inventory state cannot be read, or absence does not prove missing because the item may be consumed, transformed, or only used as quest context
statusPolicy.details: Ownership status is derived only from save inventory evidence. Acquisition metadata is user guidance and never drives ownership status.

unresolved.details: Raw Prosthetic Tool source goods are consumed or transformed when fitted, so absence of these goods is not promoted to missing.
Some quest-context texts may be consumed, transformed, or superseded. Their absence is reported as unknown until retention semantics are verified.
Acquisition event flags for these key items are not mapped yet; ownership status uses inventory evidence only.

statusPolicy.completedRequires: verified ending completion event/progression flag; none is mapped yet
statusPolicy.availableRequires: all mapped required route items present and no verified permanent block evidence present
statusPolicy.incompleteRequires: route is still possible by currently verified evidence, but required items, quest steps, or progression are missing
statusPolicy.blockedRequires: verified permanent block evidence proves the ending can no longer be completed in the current playthrough
statusPolicy.unknownRequires: insufficient evidence, including potential block evidence whose permanence is not verified
statusPolicy.details: Ending route analysis reuses verified Key Item analyzer results. Boss Memories, Memory ItemLot flags, and boss status are not used as ending completion evidence.
